twitch_info.title: See the Moon (Performance)
twitch_info.description: Seeing the Moon but it's Daylight Savings Time

i think more guy games should put the saves in inconvenient and slow places to make speedrunning risk reward

yeah the game uses a lot of mystery dungeon songs
wtf is up with games making you solve a puzzle with unowns from Pokemon, this is at least the 3rd game I've seen it in and that's saying a lot cause I've only seen like 10 guy games ever
Pokemon respawn in general but no, the monster house is a burst that surprises you at once
